title: Fragment, (The body)
content:
The body,
    Eternal Shadow of the finite Soul,
    The Soul's self-symbol, its image of itself.
    Its own yet not itself
meaning:
This evocative piece by Samuel Taylor Coleridge, titled "Fragment, (The body)", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
